description: Root node for compliance enforcement and penalties
General failure to comply with HIPAA requirements
Improper use or disclosure of PHI (incl. reproductive health)
Failure to properly notify individuals, media, or HHS
Covered entity did not know and reasonably should not have known of the violation
Violation due to reasonable cause and not willful neglect
Willful neglect but corrected within 30 days of discovery
Willful neglect and NOT corrected within 30 days
Regulatory investigation initiated by HHS OCR
Official action taken by OCR (e.g. warning letter)
Mandatory Corrective Action Plan (CAP) imposed by OCR
Financial penalty imposed by OCR for non-compliance
Criminal charges pursued by the Department of Justice (DOJ)
